story.tasks:
- [ ] Task 1: PrismaService oluştur ve lifecycle hooks implement et (AC: 1, 3) - [ ] Subtask 1.1: `src/database/` klasörünü oluştur - [ ] Subtask 1.2: `src/database/prisma.service.ts` dosyasını oluştur - [ ] Subtask 1.3: PrismaService class'ını PrismaClient'ı extend ederek tanımla - [ ] Subtask 1.4: `onModuleInit()` method'unu implement et: `await this.$connect()` çağrısı - [ ] Subtask 1.5: `onModuleDestroy()` method'unu implement et: `await this.$disconnect()` çağrısı - [ ] Subtask 1.6: `enableShutdownHooks(app: INestApplication)` method'unu implement et - [ ] Subtask 1.7: Service'i @Injectable() decorator ile işaretle
- [ ] Task 2: PrismaModule oluştur ve global module olarak yapılandır (AC: 2, 5) - [ ] Subtask 2.1: `src/database/prisma.module.ts` dosyasını oluştur - [ ] Subtask 2.2: @Module() decorator ile module tanımla - [ ] Subtask 2.3: @Global() decorator ekle (tüm module'lerden erişilebilir olması için) - [ ] Subtask 2.4: PrismaService'i providers array'ine ekle - [ ] Subtask 2.5: PrismaService'i exports array'ine ekle - [ ] Subtask 2.6: AppModule'e (`src/app.module.ts`) import et - [ ] Subtask 2.7: AppModule'de PrismaModule'ü imports array'ine ekle
- [ ] Task 3: Connection pooling yapılandırması kontrol et (AC: 4) - [ ] Subtask 3.1: Prisma schema dosyasında (`schema.prisma`) datasource block'unu kontrol et - [ ] Subtask 3.2: Connection pooling için Prisma default değerlerini doğrula (10 connection) - [ ] Subtask 3.3: Environment variable üzerinden connection_limit ayarlanabilirliğini not et (opsiyonel) - [ ] Subtask 3.4: Connection pool min/max değerlerini dokümante et (5 min, 20 max)
- [ ] Task 4: Main.ts'te shutdown hooks'u etkinleştir (AC: 3) - [ ] Subtask 4.1: `src/main.ts` dosyasını aç - [ ] Subtask 4.2: Bootstrap function içinde PrismaService'i app'ten inject et - [ ] Subtask 4.3: `prismaService.enableShutdownHooks(app)` çağrısını ekle - [ ] Subtask 4.4: Graceful shutdown test et (SIGTERM signal ile)
- [ ] Task 5: Service injection test et (AC: 6) - [ ] Subtask 5.1: Herhangi bir module'de (örn. AppModule veya test module) PrismaService'i constructor'a inject et - [ ] Subtask 5.2: Injection'ın başarılı olduğunu doğrula (undefined değil) - [ ] Subtask 5.3: `prismaService.$connect()` çağrısının çalıştığını test et - [ ] Subtask 5.4: Database connection'ın başarılı olduğunu doğrula (simple query: `SELECT 1`)
- [ ] Task 6: Integration test ve validation (AC: All) - [ ] Subtask 6.1: `npm run start:dev` ile uygulamayı başlat - [ ] Subtask 6.2: Application bootstrap sırasında PrismaService connection log'unu gör - [ ] Subtask 6.3: Health endpoint test et (veya basit bir query ile connection test) - [ ] Subtask 6.4: Application'ı kapat (Ctrl+C) ve disconnect log'unu kontrol et - [ ] Subtask 6.5: TypeScript compilation başarılı (no errors) - [ ] Subtask 6.6: Tüm acceptance criteria'yı verify et

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. **AC-1.4.1:** `src/database/prisma.service.ts` oluşturulmuş (PrismaClient extend eden class) 2. **AC-1.4.2:** `src/database/prisma.module.ts` oluşturulmuş (Global module with @Global() decorator) 3. **AC-1.4.3:** PrismaService, `onModuleInit` ve `enableShutdownHooks` implement ediyor 4. **AC-1.4.4:** Connection pooling configured (`datasource db` içinde connection_limit veya prisma default 10 connection) 5. **AC-1.4.5:** PrismaModule, AppModule'e import edilmiş (`app.module.ts` imports array'inde) 6. **AC-1.4.6:** Service başarıyla inject edilebiliyor (test: constructor injection çalışıyor)

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Database Infrastructure & Project Setup
doc.snippet: PrismaService: PrismaClient wrapper, connection management, lifecycle hooks. PrismaModule: Global module providing PrismaService to all feature modules.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Database Infrastructure & Project Setup
doc.snippet: Complete Prisma schema with core entities: User, Permission, Role, RefreshToken, OTPVerification, File, Notification. All entities include domainID for multi-tenancy and deletedAt for soft-delete pattern.

doc.title: Architecture - Boilerplate
doc.snippet: Database infrastructure location: src/database/ containing prisma.service.ts (PrismaClient wrapper) and prisma.module.ts (Global module).

doc.title: Architecture - Boilerplate
doc.snippet: Database Infrastructure components integrate with all modules via PrismaService injection. Global module pattern ensures service availability without explicit imports.

doc.title: Architecture - Boilerplate
doc.snippet: Connection pooling configured with Prisma defaults (10 connections). Recommended production settings: min 5, max 20 connections.

doc.title: Story 1.3: Interactive Database Selection Script
doc.snippet: Schema.prisma file generated and ready. Prisma v6.16.0 installed. DATABASE_URL configured in .env file. This story (1.4) is the FIRST to use Prisma Client - must run `npx prisma generate` before coding.

artifact.reason: Root module where PrismaModule must be imported. Currently has empty imports array that needs PrismaModule added.
Application entry point where PrismaService shutdown hooks must be enabled. Needs to inject PrismaService and call enableShutdownHooks(app).

constraint.description: PrismaService MUST extend PrismaClient - do not create a wrapper with composition pattern. Use inheritance for proper TypeScript typing and method access.
PrismaModule MUST use @Global() decorator to make PrismaService available to all modules without explicit imports. This is the NestJS recommended pattern for database services.
PrismaService MUST implement OnModuleInit (for $connect) and OnModuleDestroy (for $disconnect). Also MUST implement enableShutdownHooks method for graceful shutdown.
File names MUST use kebab-case: prisma.service.ts, prisma.module.ts. Directory names also kebab-case: src/database/
All code MUST pass TypeScript strict mode compilation. Enable noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks, strictFunctionTypes.
Imports MUST follow 8-group order: 1) Libraries (NestJS, Prisma), 2) DTOs, 3) Services, 4) Repositories, 5) Entities, 6) Interfaces, 7) Enums, 8) Events
Use Prisma default connection pooling (10 connections). Document that production can configure via DATABASE_URL parameter: ?connection_limit=20
CRITICAL: Before implementing PrismaService, MUST run `npx prisma generate` to generate Prisma Client from schema.prisma. This is the first story to use Prisma Client.

interface.name: PrismaService
AppModule Integration
Main.ts Integration

tests.standards: Testing should follow NestJS testing patterns using Jest v30.x. Unit tests for services should use TestingModule to create isolated test instances with mocked dependencies. Integration tests should use a test database. Coverage threshold: 70% minimum. PrismaService tests should mock the Prisma Client methods ($connect, $disconnect, $on) rather than connecting to a real database in unit tests.

test.description: Unit test: PrismaService class exists and extends PrismaClient
test.approach: Use instanceof check and verify PrismaClient methods are accessible
Mock $connect method, call onModuleInit, verify $connect was called once
Mock $disconnect method, call onModuleDestroy, verify $disconnect was called once

test.description: Unit test: enableShutdownHooks registers beforeExit handler
test.approach: Mock $on method and app.close(), call enableShutdownHooks, verify $on('beforeExit') was registered

test.description: Integration test: PrismaModule is global and exports PrismaService
test.approach: Create TestingModule with PrismaModule, verify PrismaService can be injected without explicit import

test.description: Integration test: PrismaService can be injected into another service
test.approach: Create test service that injects PrismaService, verify injection is successful and not undefined

test.description: Manual test: Connection pooling uses Prisma defaults
test.approach: Start application and monitor database connections, verify ~10 connections in pool

test.description: E2E test: Application starts, connects to database, and shuts down gracefully
test.approach: Bootstrap full application, verify connection logs, send SIGTERM, verify disconnect logs
